message:
chore(pt-core): Improve stale lock detection and minor cleanups

## Improved Stale Lock Detection (executor.rs, alpha_investing.rs)
Enhanced the kill(pid, 0) check to properly distinguish between:
- ESRCH: Process doesn't exist → lock IS stale
- EPERM: Process exists but no signal permission → lock NOT stale
- Other errors: Assume stale for safety

Previously, any non-zero return from kill() was treated as "stale",
which incorrectly classified EPERM as stale when the process was
actually alive but owned by a different user.

## Other Changes
- causal_interventions.rs: Remove unused import (CausalInterventions)
- mod.rs: Export causal_interventions module and types
- writer.rs: Replace .unwrap() with .expect() for better panic messages
- pt: Simplify GUM_AVAILABLE handling in shell script

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
